TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Michelle Bachelet ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 9, Michelle Bachelet, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Chile ta' misuw hya' ga Michelle Bachelet, aring ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: mi ¶~ ®ńßelle ő≤a ¶~ ®ńßelet rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, mi ¶~ ®ńßelle ő≤a ¶~ ®ńßelet, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ¶~ ®ńßile ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mi ¶~ ®ńßelle ő≤a ¶~ ®ńßelet, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
